title: ManhuntButItWorks
description: Paper plugin that finally makes the classic Manhunt tracking compass actually usable. Get a compass, right-click to pick who to hunt, and it points right at them in real time.
body:
Tired of Manhunt compasses that glitch out, disappear on death, or just don't point right? **ManhuntButItWorks** is a simple, reliable Paper plugin (1.21.x) that gives you a proper tracking compass for speedrunner vs. hunters gameplay.

### How to Use

1. Get the compass  
   Run `/manhuntcompass` (or shorthand `/mhc`)

2. Choose your target  
   Right-click the compass to cycle through online players (each click = next player)

3. Track them down  
   The needle points to their exact location and updates every second as they move

No offsets, no vanishing items — it just works.

### Features

- Real-time player tracking (needle always accurate)  
- Easy right-click cycling through players  
- Compass stays with you after death  
- Can't drop or lose it accidentally (use `/removecompass` to get rid of it)  
- Quick help menu with `/manhunthelp`

### Commands

- `/manhuntcompass` — Give yourself a tracking compass  
- `/manhuntcompass <player>` — Give one to someone else (OP only)  
- `/removecompass` — Remove the compass from your inventory  
- `/manhunthelp` — View all commands and info

Great for casual Manhunts, streams, or private servers. Lightweight, no config nonsense — drop it in and play.

Tested on **Paper 1.21.x** (likely works on Purpur/Folia too).

Got feedback or want a feature? Let me know!
